name: Kokepii

name: Kokoro Shigure
description: A first year junior high school student, one year below [Uta](https://anilist.co/character/353001) and [Nana](https://anilist.co/character/353002/Nana-Aokaze). She is a determined girl who is good at dancing and keeps a lot of enthusiasm bottled up inside her.

name: Koutarou Tamon
description: __Height:__ 178 cm High school student who can hear the voices of spirits, but can't see them. Because of his psychic abilities, the people around him thought he was strange and looked at him with strange eyes, so now making eye contact with a living person can cause him to vomit. As a result he can have normal conversations with spirits whose faces he cannot see and whose voices he can hear.

name: Manana Nonomura
description: Manana is Chio's best friend who has been with her since elementary school. Despite their close friendship, the two will occasionally try to backstab each other. Can also be quite vicious when angry.

name: Masaki Hinaoka
description: A dried-potato-loving young man who was born and raised in Ooarai. He befriended the transfer student Shou, and went along with his hobbies. As a result he got into surfing. He has a great sense of balance, and is progressing in skill, but he is actually a complete beginner at swimming. When he tries to do swim, he is often compared to a corgi in water. (Source: Anime News Network)

name: Miiko
description: Miiko is the best friend and classmate of Momo Ayase and Kei in high school.

name: Moa
description: __Height:__ 161 cm __Group:__ Plasmagica __Position:__ Vocals and Drums A naturally eccentric, high-energy space-sheep girl who arrived from a distant galaxy on a research mission. Her musical sensibilities are truly cosmic—unrivaled among the group members. She has a habit of blurting out whatever crosses her mind, which occasionally lands her bandmates in trouble. Her signature verbal tic—ending her sentences with "pyuru"—is apparently a communication code from her home planet.

name: Morgans
description: __Height:__ 305 cm (10'0") __Affiliations:__ World Economy News Paper; Underworld __Devil Fruit:__ Tori Tori no Mi, Model: Albatross __Devil Fruit Type:__ Zoan President of the World Economic Journal and one of the emperors of the Underworld. Morgans gets excited by major events, looking forward to reporting them as news to the world. He tends to exclaim "Big News!" when witnessing a newsworthy event. name: Mukuro
description: Mukuro is one of the Three Kings of Makai. She's been a sex slave since birth and on her 7th birthday she decided to pour acid on her body to have her master abandon her. Once free, she replaced the burned right side of her body with mechanical parts and masked herself to hide her womanly status. name: Mutsunokami Yoshiyuki
description: A tachi sword is known as the beloved sword of Sakamoto Ryoma. Although he still retains a somewhat country-like appearance, he loves new things and values ​​forward-thinking thinking. He is straightforward in both his own ambition and loyalty to his master.

name: Nanase  Nijirou

name: Nishiki
description: A "half-baked" Fuuma ninja who infiltrated the prison looking to avenge her clan, but was convinced to abandon this way of life by Soramaru.

name: Prinz
description: She is a devil who embodies the fear of spiders,and is a Public Safety Devil Hunter from Special Division 4. The Spider Devil usually takes a human shape so she tends to be friendly to humans and works as a devil hunter herself, however she will still kill people for just looking at her the wrong way.

name: Rebecca Miyamoto
description: Rebecca, also referred to as "Becky" by her class, is the homeroom teacher of class 1-C and a mathematics teacher. She was born to an American father and a Japanese mother, although she keeps her mother's last name. Rebecca enrolled at MIT at the age of nine and graduated at ten with a triple major. name: Reim Lunettes
description: Reim is a member of Pandora. Being a very nervous guy, he is constantly being mocked by Break and endures much teasing from him. To Reim's frustration, he grudgingly completes much of Break's work, making him ongoingly busy whenever Oz runs into him. Though he complains about this a lot, he is shown to be quite caring and perceptive, especially about Break and Sharon. name: Ren Aharen
description: Younger brother to Reina Aharen. He occasionally likes to wear his older sister's clothes, which fooled Raidou into thinking he was Reina.

name: Rook Hunt
description: Rook Hunt is a third-year and the vice head of Pomefiore. He loves beautiful things, and appreciates Vil and Epel's beauty. He's an elusive individual.

name: Runo Misaki
description: She’s a tomboy through and through. As a twelve year old, Runo isn’t your typical pre-teen girl. She loves playing Bakugan with the boys! Runo can be a sore loser and her battling can be inconsistent. She sometimes gets in the way of her team members. Runo has a crush on Dan (although she wouldn’t admit it) and is jealous of Julie. name: Ryouko Fueguchi
description: [Hinami](https://anilist.co/character/88293/Hinami-Fueguchi)'s mother.

name: Ryouko Hanuki
description: A student at the university studying dentistry. She likes getting inebriated, at which point she drastically loses her sense of judgement and flirts with whoever is around. Aware of this, she is cautious about choosing who she goes drinking with. She is very good at speaking in English. ~!She serves as a formal love interest for the protagonist in episodes 6-8.!~
